channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Thompson hits game-winning shot and scores 33 points as Rockets rally past Celtics 114-112
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Amen Thompson hit a game-winning floater with 0.7 seconds left and finished with 33 points to lead the Houston Rockets to a 114-112 victory over the Boston Celtics on Monday night. Dillon Brooks shot 10 of 15 from 3-point range and led Houston with 36 points.
item.dc:creator: KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Surging Rockets beat the Celtics after knocking off the Cavaliers twice
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — The Houston Rockets have been one of the NBA’s more surprising teams this season. After their past three games, they shouldn’t shock anyone.
item.dc:creator: KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Flagg's big 2nd half helps No. 2 Duke hold off NC State 74-64 to stay unbeaten in ACC
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Star freshman Cooper Flagg scored 23 of his 28 points after halftime to help No. 2 Duke hold off North Carolina State 74-64 on Monday night. Fellow rookie Kon Knueppel had 19 points for the Blue Devils (18-2, 10-0 Atlantic Coast Conference), who have won 14 straight games.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scheyer: Duke's Maluach OK after vomiting on court during 2nd half of win over NC State
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke coach Jon Scheyer said freshman big man Khaman Maluach was OK after vomiting on the court during the second half of Monday night's 74-64 win against North Carolina State. The 7-foot-2 Maluach was standing just outside the lane near the baseline behind N.C.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UVU hoping to make first NCAA Tournament
item.description: OREM, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Duke, Michigan State, Auburn, Houston andUtah Valley? All of those college basketball teams own double-digit winning streaks right now, with the Wolverines having just won their tenth in a row.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: Lady Vols coach Kim Caldwell returns 1 week after giving birth to son
item.description: KNOXVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Tennessee coach Kim Caldwell returned to the sideline a week after giving birth to a son and was greeted with a standing ovation from a crowd of 12,033 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: AL LESAR, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: CMU Women's Lacrosse looks to rewrite history
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Mesa University women's lacrosse team has been a dominant force in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference, finishing in second place for four straight years. This year, however, the Mavericks are determined to rewrite history.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Cubs, WGN were early Chicago connections for Ben Johnson
item.description: CHICAGO — Like so many Cubs fans around the country, Ben Johnson also ran inside to watch Cubs baseball on WGN after school. In Johnson's highly-anticipated introductory press conference, he mentioned that he and his family go to a Cubs game once a year.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego Wave FC unveils 2025 regular season schedule
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is set to kick off its fourth season in the National Women’s Soccer League (NWSL) with an exciting 26-game schedule, the team announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Trial postponed for Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers in domestic case
item.description: New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is scheduled to go on trial Wednesday on domestic violence charges.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation
